---
name: Refactor
about: Request internal cleanup, simplification, or technical debt reduction without changing intended behavior
title: "refactor: "
labels:
  - enhancement
assignees: []
---

## Summary
<!-- Describe the refactor request in 1-3 sentences. What should be improved, simplified,
or cleaned up? -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why should this be refactored now? Examples: dead code, duplication, unclear
boundaries, warning cleanup, brittle tests, or maintenance cost. -->

## Evidence
<!-- Provide concrete evidence from the codebase. -->
- Current location(s):
- Warning, smell, or maintenance issue:
- Current caller or usage analysis:
- Related issue, PR, or archived OpenSpec change:

## Desired outcome
<!-- State the target result. Keep this focused on internal structure, not feature changes.
-->
-
-

## Non-goals
<!-- What this issue should NOT do. This keeps refactors from turning into feature work.
-->
-
-

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] The affected code is simplified, clarified, removed, or better structured
- [ ] Intended runtime behavior remains unchanged, unless explicitly noted above
- [ ] Dead code, warnings, or unused helpers are removed or justified
- [ ] Any impacted tests are updated as needed
- [ ] The change remains scoped to refactoring, not feature expansion

## Notes
<!-- Add tradeoffs, constraints, sequencing concerns, or anything reviewers should know.
-->
